name: Daily revenue snapshot
prompt: Pull today's Shopify orders, refunds via Composio. Compute net revenue, AOV, return rate. Estimate contribution margin (revenue - paid spend - estimated COGS). Save to outputs/daily/{date}.json.

name: Sunday weekly P&L
prompt: Compile last 7 days: revenue, ad spend, blended CAC, contribution margin. Compare to last week + 4-week trailing. Output to outputs/weekly-pnl-{date}.md. Feeds Director Mon review.

name: Monthly close
prompt: Last day of each month: monthly P&L. MRR progress check vs £15k target trajectory (0%/33%/66%/100% at days 0/30/60/90). Email Caner the report.
